Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Yazılım Mühendisi Ankara About Job Mavinci is an R&D company working in the fields of information and communication technologies, security and defence with software development, technical support, domain expertise and consultancy capacity. The operational areas are Cyber Security, Nuclear Security Research and Analysis, Disaster and Emergency Management, Decision Support Systems, Command and Control Systems, Chemical Biological Radiological and Nuclear Security Solutions, Image Processing, Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Modelling and Simulation and Project Management. The company's goal is to develop new technologies and produce innovative solutions and network-centric key products. Mavinci is seeking a Software Engineer to join its Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technologies team. The ideal candidate will have industry experience working on AI-powered unmanned systems (UAS/UAV), Linux companion computers (CC) and mobile ground control stations (GCS). The position will involve research and development with MAVLink drone messaging protocol, Android SDK (Software Development Kit) and Android NDK (Native Development Kit) to solve telemetry and autonomous navigation problems. Software Engineer Requirements: - Bachelor's degree in software engineering, computer engineering, electronic engineering, mechatronics, - At least 3 years of experience in C++ and Java programming languages, - Additional/nice-to-have experience in Golang and React/TypeScript, - Knowledge of design patterns, memory management, smart pointers, template programming, thread synchronisation, and optimisation, - Knowledge of containerization, OCI standards, Docker, Linux namespaces (PID/NET/UTS/NS), and cgroups v2, - Knowledge of network programming and protocols such as gRPC, WebSockets, WebRTC, and MAVLink v2, - At least B2 (Upper Intermediate) English level. Software Engineer Responsibilities: - Programming in C++17 and Java, - Creating unit tests, - Using Linux CLI, Docker, and virtualisation tools (like QEMU) in the cross-compiling development environment, - Utilising Git and CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI) for source control, automated testing, and deployment, - Setting up drone sub-systems like sensors and single board computers (SBC), - Managing flight controller communications using the MAVLink protocol, - Participating in Agile software development as a development team member in Scrum. İşe Alım Çözümleri İlan Paketi Al Sizi Arayalım Bizi Arayın: 0216 468 76 00 Giriş Yap / Üye Ol Ana Sayfa İş İlanları Kocaeli İş İlanları Kocaeli Kıdemli Gömülü Yazılım Mühendisi İş İlanları Senior Embedded Software Engineer DSLAB YAZILIM ANONİM ŞİRKETİ Kaydet Başvur Kocaeli (Gebze) Son gün info İş Yerinde Tam Zamanlı Uzman AR-GE 152 başvuru Şirket ilanları bugün inceledi. Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Kıdemli Gömülü Yazılım Mühendisi Kocaeli İş İlanı Hakkında Hakkımızda DSLAB olarak, 2012 yılından bu yana endüstriyel teknoloji ve yazılım alanında biriktirdiğimiz köklü tecrübe ile Bilişim Vadisi kampüsünde IoT ve kestirimci bakım (predictive maintenance) çözümleri üretiyoruz. Yakın dönemde bünyemize kattığımız stratejik yatırımların sağladığı ivme ile yazılım ve donanım ekosistemimizi ve veri işleme platformumuzu dünya standartlarına taşımayı hedefliyoruz. Bu heyecan verici büyüme sürecinde; Yazılım, AI ve donanım ekiplerimiz arasında teknik köprü kuracak, mimari vizyonumuza yön verecek bir lider arıyoruz. Rolün Amacı Bu pozisyon, yüksek performanslı MCU mimarileri üzerinde endüstriyel IoT cihazlarının firmware stratejisini kurgulayacak ve donanım ekibine teknik yönlendirmeler yapacak bir "Kıdemli Mühendis" rolüdür. Aradığımız uzman; ARM Cortex-M7 tabanlı sistemlerde gerçek zamanlı veri işleme mimarilerini tasarlanması, düşük güç tüketimli kablosuz haberleşme (LoRaWAN) çözümlerini implement eden ve donanım-yazılım entegrasyonunda standartların belirlenmesiyle ilgili çalışmaları yönetecek ve yürütecektir. Temel Sorumluluklar Firmware Mimarisi: Yüksek performanslı MCU tabanlı sistemlerin sürdürülebilir, modüler ve yüksek kaliteli firmware mimarisini tasarlamak ve geliştirmek. Gerçek Zamanlı Sistemler: ARM Cortex-M7 (tercihen dual-core) tabanlı platformlarda gerçek zamanlı uygulamalar geliştirmek. Haberleşme Katmanları: SPI, I2C, ADC çevre birimleri ile CAN/CAN-FD ve LoRaWAN tabanlı kablosuz haberleşme çözümlerini optimize ederek implement etmek. Performans Optimizasyonu: DMA ve interrupt mekanizmalarını performans odaklı yönetmek; Bootloader ve güvenli firmware güncelleme (OTA) mimarilerini kurgulamak. Aranan Nitelikler Eğitim & Deneyim: Elektrik & Elektronik Mühendisliği, Elektronik ve Haberleşme Mühendisliği veya dengi lisans bölümlerinden, gömülü sistemler alanında kıdemli uzmanlık. C/C++ Uzmanlığı: İleri seviye C/C++ bilgisi ve sürdürülebilir kod yazma disiplini. Donanım Hakimiyeti: Yüksek performanslı MCU (tercihen NXP RT serisi) ve gerçek zamanlı sistem geliştirme tecrübesi. Haberleşme Protokolleri: CAN-FD, LoRaWAN ve standart çevre birimleri (SPI, I2C, ADC) konusunda derin uygulama tecrübesi. Sistem Seviyesi Düşünme: Bootloader tasarımı, firmware güvenliği ve sistem seviyesinde teknik karar alma yetkinliği. İmkanlar & Sosyal Haklar Lokasyon: Bilişim Vadisi (Gebze). Ulaşım: İstanbul (Anadolu & Avrupa), Sakarya, Yalova ve Kocaeli'den sağlanan kapsamlı personel servisi ağı. Aday Kriterleri • Tecrübe 6 - 12 yıl arası • Eğitim Seviyesi Üniversite(Mezun), Yüksek Lisans(Mezun), Doktora(Mezun) • Askerlik Durumu Yapıldı, Muaf • Yabancı Dil İngilizce(Okuma : İleri, Yazma : İleri, Konuşma : İleri) Daha Fazla Göster keyboard_arrow_down Şirket Hakkında DSLAB YAZILIM ANONİM ŞİRKETİ Bilişim, Bilişim Makine ve Ekipmanları, Yazılım, Elektronik Kart Sistemleri, Elektrikli ve Elektronik Aletler 1 - 24 Çalışan 78 Takipçi Takip Et DSLAB, sektördeki 15 yıllık saha tecrübesi ve derin mühendislik birikimiyle; döner ekipmanlar, güç aktarım sistemleri ve kritik endüstriyel varlıklar için Kestirimci Bakım (Predictive Maintenance) çözümleri geliştirmektedir. Temelleri endüstriyel saha dinamikleri üzerine atılan şirketimiz, günümüzde donanım ve yazılım ekosistemini yapay zeka ile entegre ederek uçtan uca teknolojik çözümler sunmaktadır. Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur DevOps Mühendisi İstanbul İş İlanı Hakkında Asis Elektronik is a fast-growing organization and market leader in smart technology solutions with over 450 employees. Our solutions help transport authorities to provide effective transit systems via easing passenger movement and improving operations management. Besides Turkey, our portfolio covers countries in Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and South Asia with on-ground operations. As an R&D and innovation-focused company, we are developing next-generation technology for smart transportation and smart cities. In addition, we are developing applications for automotive, defense, and financial technologies. As Asis Elektronik, we are among the companies that shape the IT sector with our value-adding solutions. With our successful performance in different categories, we took our place in the 22nd “Top 500 IT Companies Survey” conducted by BT News. We are looking for a ''DevSecOps Engineer’’creative, game changer, innovative thinker, who takes initiative and is driven to help improve systems and embraces a culture of teamwork. Qualifications & Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, Information Security, or a related field 4–5 years of experience in Application Security or DevSecOps roles Hands-on experience with Burp Suite Pro, SonarQube, and CI/CD platforms Ability to under stand and review application code (Java, .NET, or similar technologies) Strong knowledge of OWASP Top 10 and Mobile Security Standards (OWASP MASVS) Experience in automation scripting Solid knowledge of Linux & Windows systems administration Strong understanding of network and application security fundamentals Analytical thinking, problem-solving mindset, and teamwork orientation Good command of English (written & verbal) We are looking for a hands-on Security Engineer to secure our entire SDLC. You will act as the bridge between security and engineering, performing deep-dive Web & Mobile penetration tests while architecting automated security gates within ourCI/CD pipelines. Responsibilities Conduct Gray-box/Black-box testing on Web Apps and APIs, focusing on complex business logic vulnerabilities. Perform dynamic analysis and reverse engineering on Mobile Apps (iOS/Android) using tools like Frida and Objection. Embed SAST, DAST, and SCA tools into CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab, etc.) to automate vulnerability detection. Write custom scripts (Python/Bash/Go) to orchestrate security scans and enforce quality gates. Perform Secure Code Reviews and guide developers on remediation strategies. Manage and tune WAF policies to block attacks while maintaining application availability. Contribute to secure architecture design and DevSecOps practices What’s in it for you Opportunity to work on smart city, transportation, and fintech technologies Experience in an Agile and innovation-driven environment Collaboration with a dynamic and highly skilled engineering team Hybrid working model Continuous learning and professional development opportunities Next Step If you are excited about building secure systems and want to work on meaningful technologies shaping the future of smart cities, we would love to hear from you. **Your personal data gathered in your application to this job advertisement will be processed in automated systems to manage job application procedures by Asis Elektronik ve Bilişim Sistemleri A.Ş. according to the Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (“KVKK”) and related regulations. Project Management & APQP Lead and manage the APQP process for new product development projects Prepare and monitor project timing plans and customer milestones Conduct project risk assessments based on risk-based thinking methodology Manage engineering changes (ECR/ECN) and change management processes 2. Manufacturing Feasibility & Process Design Perform Design for Manufacturing (DFM/DFA) analyses during quotation stage Develop and maintain Process Flow Diagram (PFD), PFMEA, and Control Plan in a synchronized structure Identify Special Characteristics (CC/SC) and define process control strategies Plan and execute process validation and capability studies prior to serial production 3. Prototype & PPAP Management Coordinate prototype, pilot production and industrialization activities Conduct Run@Rate and capacity verification studies Prepare and submit complete PPAP documentation package to customers and obtain PSW approval Plan and monitor Safe Launch activities 4. Serial Production & Continuous Improvement Monitor production KPIs such as OEE, PPM, Cp/Cpk , and lead efficiency improvement initiatives Actively participate in 8D teams to resolve internal and customer quality issues Maintain FMEA, Control Plan and related quality documents as living documents Manage customer notification and re-PPAP processes in case of engineering changes 5. Measurement & Testing Activities Plan, execute and report Functional Test Laboratory activities Define and commission required measurement devices, fixtures and test equipment for new products Organize and evaluate MSA studies to ensure measurement system reliability 6. Supplier Development Support Support supplier APQP and PPAP activities for purchased parts Evaluate supplier process capability Follow up supplier corrective actions within 8D methodology Preferred Candidate • Years of Experience 5 - 15 years of experience • Level of Education Bachelor’s(Graduate), Master’s(Student), Master’s(Graduate) • Military Status Completed • Languages English(Reading : Advanced, Writing : Advanced, Speaking : Advanced) , German(Reading : Good, Writing : Good, Speaking : Good) • Driving License Class B2 Daha Fazla Göster keyboard_arrow_down Şirket Hakkında Gizli Firma Bu Pozisyon İçin Sık Paylaşılan Maaşlar Maaş aralığı kullanıcıların en sık paylaştığı verilere dayanır. As a Maintenance Engineer with a focus on our manufacturing facility as a problem identifier and solver to make a difference in the lives of our users. You will be involved in developing and improving our production facility which includes mixing, processing and packaging machines as well as a purification and processing facility at Wellspect, Kahramankazan, Ankara . Responsibilities: ·         Monitoring the electrical preventive and corrective maintenance and overhauling work activities to ensure safe and efficient application of procedures by using Preventive Maintenance module and implementation of optimal electrical maintenance ·         Ensuring that all documentation is completed in maintenance management system correctly such as the log, outlining the fault, method of repair and the time, labor and materials used ·         Managing the timely response to all emergency breakdowns and provide prompt corrective action to ensure plant availability, thereby minimizing downtime ·         Developing and promoting a condition based preventive maintenance culture on day to day basis by conducting troubleshooting and root cause analysis, breakdown analysis and finding solutions to reduce reactive maintenance ·         Performing routine checks on work undertaken by technicians to ensure the required levels of quality are being met and within agreed budget forecasts ·         Preparing technical specifications (CR, URS, RFI etc.) for the machines and equipment in the scope of projects and investments ·         Keeping track of KPI's (Downtime/Unit energy consumptions etc.) in responsibility areas ·         Organizing and supervising the subcontractors by means HSE precautions in the plant and supported work permit process ·         Organization of blue collar workers in maintenance workshop ·         Managing necessary spare parts and maintenance consumables with purchasing&stocking responsible ·         Following and reporting on plant sustainability targets and to lead energy efficiency projects We think you are a positive, systematic and driven team player. You are open for challenges and enjoy working together with highly skilled and committed colleagues. Background / Qualifications: ·         An academic background, preferably in Electrical / Electronic/ Mechatronic Engineering required with at least 5 or more years of experience as a Maintenance Engineer ·         Knowledge of downtime analysis and practical knowledge of problem solving tools ·         Knowledge of maintenance management methods, of predictive inspection tools ·         Team work and effective collaboration skills ·         Experience in auxiliary facilities (Boilers, Compressors, HVACs, Water Treatment Systems etc.) is a plus ·         Experience in technical drawing software (AutoCAD, EPLAN, TIA Portal,  SolidWorks etc.) ·         Knowledgeable in CMMS ·         Experience work in ATEX Environment is a plus ·         Experience in Medical Devices environment is a plus ·         Documentation and communication skills in English Wellspects’ production is in continuous evolvement and there are always new and interesting projects going on. We offer you a place to develop your skills as part of a cross-functional team and the medical devices we manufacture make a real difference in the lives of our users . That’s a reason to go to work! Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Proje ve Satınalma Mühendisi İzmir About Job About Türk Tuborg With its rich history and longstanding international collaborations, including our partnership with the global leader, Carlsberg A/S, Türk Tuborg holds a commanding position in Türkiye’s beer industry. Our journey began in 1967 when we established our brewery in Pınarbaşı, İzmir. We launched production at this facility, Türkiye's first and largest private-sector brewery, in 1969. Since then, we have been producing beer and malt in Izmir, as well as distributing imported beer brands and various aperitif products. Pioneering many ‘firsts’ in the Turkish market and driven by a commitment to quality and a respect for traditional brewing, we regard brewing as an art form. Our mission revolves around improving production quality and diversity, striving for perfection and delivering exceptional products. At Türk Tuborg, the foundation of our success is built on four core values that we embrace in all our business processes and that shape our corporate culture: ‘Quality, Making a Difference, Cooperation, Honesty and Integrity’. We embrace the ‘Equal Opportunity’ approach as one of Türk Tuborg’s core principles. We do not tolerate discrimination in any of our processes based on religion, language, or gender differences, and we provide our colleagues with a safe and respectful work environment that promotes human rights. In our recruitment process, we embrace our ‘Equal Opportunity’ principle by ensuring a fair, objective, and data-driven approach using scientific assessment tools to match the right candidates with the right positions. We evaluate our candidates based on the knowledge, experience, and competencies required for the position they have applied for. We are proud to have been chosen ‘The Happiest Workplace in the Fast-Moving Consumer Goods Sector’ for three consecutive years, according to the ‘Türkiye’s Happiest Workplaces’ research conducted by Happy Place to Work. SAVE seeks engineers to be assigned for projects of HVAC Automation Systems, Lighting Automation Systems and Energy Efficiency Systems. We are looking for a Performance Engineer to join Digital Service Center.  We are on a mission to make our Customer's Buildings Safer, more Sustainable and Perfect Places to live and work in. Role Description: The Performance Engineer understands the Digital Portfolio for Buildings on one side and the customer’s requirement on the other and then proceeds to select, configure and deliver the right digital solutions to help customers achieve their objectives. This could involve supporting the customer in selecting and setting up the right connectivity options, setting up data collection, publishing to cloud, setting up analytics, and configuring the desired options, features, and access. The Performance Engineer thus converts data to actionable insights which help the customer improve building operations, achieve occupant comfort, reduce costs, improve energy efficiency, and promote Digitalization and Sustainability. Responsibilities: •           Deliver Digital Portfolios to customers across the European countries. •           Support Sales in conceptualizing digital solutions •           Build competencies on an ongoing basis on upcoming portfolios. Support the testing & improvement of the same. •           Participate actively in the DSC Community and promote collaboration, knowledge sharing, adoption of standards, tools, and processes. • Responsible for increasing own technical and application skills to improve service quality. • Supply creative feedback to increase the quality-of-service operations and processes • Engineers conduct testing and verification procedures to ensure that the software functions correctly. This is crucial for identifying and rectifying errors and enhancing reliability Ideal Candidate: • Bachelor's degree in Electrical//Mechanical/Mechatronics Engineering • Very good command of English both written and spoken • Minimum 5 years of experience in HVAC and Has deep knowledge of Building Technology domain (emphasis on HVAC & Energy), Solutions (BMS and Sustainability offerings etc.), Remote Analytics Service delivery (Cloud Analytics, Report/Dashboard/Analytics Generation, etc.) • Good awareness Digital Analytics & Energy Optimization Services Tools & Portfolio (Building X, Navigator, FDD, Smart Building Assessment, Demand Flow, etc.), Buildings Management System (DesigoCC, ABT Pro etc.) Alternatively, the person has good awareness of equivalent solutions in market. • Has relevant work experience. • Possesses good interpersonal skills – Team Management, Motivation, Task Delegation, Communication, Command over English language, Cross cultural sensitivity, etc. • Customer Focus Aday Kriterleri • Tecrübe 5 - 10 yıl arası • Eğitim Seviyesi Üniversite(Mezun), Yüksek Lisans(Öğrenci), Yüksek Lisans(Mezun) • Askerlik Durumu Yapıldı • Yabancı Dil İngilizce(Okuma : İleri, Yazma : İleri, Konuşma : İleri) • Ehliyet B sınıfı Daha Fazla Göster keyboard_arrow_down Şirket Hakkında Save Enerji Yönetimi ve Danışmanlık Hizmetleri Sa Proje Yönetimi 250 - 349 Çalışan 13311 Takipçi Takip Et Save olarak 2008’den bu yana uluslararası ve yerel şirketlerin Türkiye’deki ofislerinde, binalarında ve tesislerinde;

Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Ar-Ge Mühendisi Kocaeli İş İlanı Hakkında Let’s Design the Future Together! Are you ready to be part of a team that drives innovation in the automotive industry? At Anadolu Isuzu, every opinion matters, every individual is equal. We care more about what you can do than who you are. We work together to build a fair and inclusive work culture in an environment where different talents meet so that all our employees can realize their potential in the best way possible. Join the Anadolu Isuzu family as an R&D Test Engineer , undertake innovative projects, and let’s develop the transportation technologies of the future together! If you also: graduated from leading universities in Mechanical Engineering, Automotive Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering, have minimum 2 years of experience in vehicle component, vehicle system or complete vehicle testing, have knowledge of sensors and their working principles, are experienced in engine sign-off tests, vehicle dynamics tests, noise measurements and electrical measurements, can use data acquisition systems such as Vbox, Edaq, Dewesoft, Quantum, etc., have experience in data post-processing (nCode / GlyphWorks software), have knowledge of electric vehicles, have basic electrical knowledge, hold a valid driver’s license and actively drive, have strong written and verbal communication skills, are a team player and take responsibility, have an analytical mindset and are result-oriented, have no restrictions for domestic or international travel, then this opportunity is for you! We expect you to manage your time effectively, be inclined to teamwork, demonstrate a human-oriented approach and be open to continuous learning. What will you do when you join us? You will perform complete vehicle, system and sub-system tests in line with project plans and relevant test procedures. You will collect and process test data using nCode / GlyphWorks software. You will report test results in accordance with defined processes and formats. How Does Our Journey Progress? Preliminary Evaluation Process Technical & Competency Based Interview Evaluation Tests Physical Interview Reference Check Offer Process Note: Process steps may vary depending on the nature of the position being interviewed. We Grow with Our Differences, Empowered by Equality! At Anadolu Isuzu, every idea counts and every individual matters. Apply now to take part in this journey! Who Are We? As the Anadolu Isuzu family, we operate in more than 50 countries outside Türkiye, with more than half of our business volume coming from overseas markets and the defense industry. At Anadolu Isuzu, we have been manufacturing commercial vehicles in Türkiye since 1984 and have been expanding our production portfolio through a publicly traded joint venture between Anadolu Group, Isuzu Motors Limited, and Itochu. We focus on the commercial vehicle segment of the automotive industry and have a strong product range, effective after-sales services, and an extensive dealer and service network. We are in an assertive position in export markets through our manufacture of trucks, light trucks, midibuses, buses and pick-ups. What Do We Offer? Brief Job Description: Responsible for 4G/5G Radio RF Network Planning & Optimization, QoS and QoE management (Radio Network analyzing and optimization with Counter & KPI analyze, Coverage Planning & Analyzing with predictions) Make Radio Network Insights regarding network problems of coverage, quality, and capacity by Huawei digital platforms using the data delivered by customer. Issue RFls: Generate Requests for Information (RFls) to clarify design intent and address discrepancies. Collaboration: Work closely with project managers, architects, and subcontractors to ensure seamless project execution. Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Satın Alma Uzmanı İzmir About Job We are seeking a Senior Procurement Engineer to join our team. This role involves managing procurement processes, negotiating with suppliers, and ensuring the timely delivery of goods and services. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in purchasing and supply chain management, with a keen eye for detail and excellent negotiation skills. This position offers the opportunity to work in a dynamic environment where you can contribute to the efficiency and success of our procurement operations. General Qualifications University graduate from relevant departments. At least 10 years of experience in procurement-related positions. Experience in capital business, mechanical, and welded structures. Advanced proficiency in English. Strong understanding of procurement processes and supply chain management. Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. Proficiency in using procurement software such as SAP. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously. Ability to build and maintain strong relationships with suppliers and stakeholders. Experience in strategic sourcing and cost analysis. Familiarity with contract management and supplier performance evaluation. Roles and Responsibilities Manage the end-to-end procurement process, from identifying needs to negotiating contracts and ensuring delivery. Develop and implement purchasing strategies to optimize cost and efficiency. Negotiate terms and conditions with suppliers to secure favorable agreements. Monitor market trends and supplier performance to identify opportunities for improvement. Collaborate with internal departments to understand their purchasing needs and provide support. Maintain accurate records of purchases, pricing, and other important data. Ensure compliance with company policies and industry regulations. Analyze purchasing data to identify cost-saving opportunities and report findings to management. Manage supplier relationships to ensure high-quality service and delivery. Coordinate with logistics and warehouse teams to ensure timely receipt of goods. Utilize procurement tools and software to streamline processes and improve efficiency. Contribute to the development of procurement policies and procedures. Stay updated on industry trends and best practices to enhance procurement operations. Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Elektrik Elektronik Mühendisi Ankara About Job About the Company Our company is a technology-driven energy company specializing in Energy Storage Systems (ESS), focusing on engineering, system design, and project development. We develop energy storage solutions that support renewable energy integration and grid flexibility. Role Overview & Responsibilities The ESS Design Engineer is responsible for the design and technical development of Energy Storage System (ESS) projects. This role supports projects across the engineering lifecycle, from concept design to detailed engineering and project execution, working closely with internal teams, suppliers, and project stakeholders to deliver reliable and scalable energy storage solutions. What You’ll Do ·       Develop system architecture and technical solutions for energy storage projects including battery systems, PCS, transformers, EMS and auxiliary systems. ·       Prepare technical specifications, system layouts, and single line diagrams (SLD). ·       Perform system sizing and configuration studies considering grid requirements and project capacity. ·       Support technical due diligence, feasibility studies, and project development activities. ·       Prepare project cost estimates, technical proposals, and Bill of Materials (BOM). ·       Develop engineering packages at different stages (concept, preliminary, detailed design and IFC). ·       Coordinate with battery suppliers, PCS manufacturers, EPC contractors, and internal teams. ·       Prepare production-oriented drawings and manufacturing documentation for ESS systems. ·       Coordinate with manufacturing teams and support production planning activities. ·       Support grid integration studies, including short-circuit analysis and protection coordination. ·       Ensure compliance with relevant standards and grid codes. ·       Provide technical support during procurement, installation, commissioning, and project execution. ·       Evaluate new battery technologies and system architectures. What You’ll Bring Education & Certifications Bachelor’s degree in Electrical & Electronics Engineering or a related field, or equivalent professional experience. Required Skills / Qualifications ·       Minimum 3 years of experience in the development of Energy Storage Systems and grid-connected energy storage projects. ·       Experience with BESS system design and integration, including battery systems, PCS (Power Conversion Systems), transformers, EMS and auxiliary systems. ·       Strong understanding of power system fundamentals, including grid integration, protection concepts, and electrical system architecture. ·       Experience preparing technical documentation, system specifications, single line diagrams (SLD), and engineering drawings. ·       Design low voltage (LV) electrical panels and control panels including protection devices, auxiliary equipment, and wiring layouts. ·       Develop electrical panel layouts and support preparation of panel manufacturing drawings and documentation. ·       Experience developing Bill of Materials (BOM), technical proposals, and project cost estimates. ·       Experience with engineering and design tools such as AutoCAD, SolidWorks, or similar CAD software for preparing system layouts, equipment placement, container configurations, and technical drawings. ·       Ability to coordinate with technology suppliers and multidisciplinary engineering teams. ·       Strong understanding of engineering workflows and project lifecycle, from concept design to construction documentation. ·       Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to evaluate system configurations and technical alternatives. ·       Effective communication skills with the ability to work across engineering, procurement, and project teams. ·       Strong organizational and time management skills with a focus on documentation quality and technical accuracy. ·       Experience with power system analysis tools such as ETAP, DIgSILENT, PowerFactory or similar software. ·       Fluency in English, both written and spoken ·       For male candidates, military service must be completed Preferred Skills / Qualifications ·       Experience in ESS manufacturing, production, and system assembly processes ·       Familiarity with grid codes and interconnection requirements. ·       Experience with SCADA, EMS, or plant-level control systems in energy projects. ·       Knowledge of international standards related to battery energy storage systems (IEC, UL, NFPA). ·       Master’s Degree on Power Electronics-Distributed Energy Lines are preferred. ·       Experience about International Works and bussienss Preferred Candidate • Years of Experience More than 3 years of experience • Level of Education Bachelor’s(Graduate), Master’s(Graduate), Doctorate(Graduate) • Military Status Completed • Languages English(Reading : Advanced, Writing : Advanced, About Role We are looking for a Senior–Mid Big Data Engineer to join our delivery-focused Big Data team. This role is fully aligned with production data migration and Big Data service deployment activities. Key Responsibilities Execute data migration projects, ensuring data accuracy, performance, and operational stability. Deploy, configure, and operate Big Data services and platforms in live production environments. Install, configure, and maintain Big Data clusters, including Hadoop ecosystem components (HDFS, Hive, Spark, Flink, MapReduce). Perform DWS (Data Warehouse Service) deployments, including setup, configuration, tuning, and post-deployment support. Design, implement, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for production Data Warehouses and Data Lakes. Optimize and troubleshoot batch processing workloads using Hive, Spark, and related technologies. Provide on-site and remote delivery support to international customers during deployment and migration phases. SAVE seeks Fire Extinguishing System Engineer to be assigned for  Fire Extinguising Systems projects This role will be responsible for the design and engineering of Fire Extinguishing Systems projects, including electrical and mechanical system design, preparation of technical drawings, engineering calculations, and project documentation. The Engineer will ensure that all system designs comply with applicable standards, project requirements, and customer specifications. The role also includes conducting site audits, verifying mechanical and electrical installations, participating in kick-off meetings, preparing as-built documentation, supporting commissioning and final acceptance tests, and delivering technical training when required. In addition, the position will provide technical sales support for new business opportunities, including reviewing technical requirements, contributing to system design concepts, and supporting the preparation of technical proposals. The position involves supporting both national and international projects and requires close coordination with internal teams, customers, and site personnel throughout all project phases. Job responsibilities; Performing the engineering support (technical sales support, engineering,system design, drawing, documentation and training support) for Fire Detection and Extinguishing Systems. Extinguishing Systems Product Management Understand the customer’s needs and take necessary actions to create appropriate solutions. Designing and integrating Fire Detection and Extinguishing Systems in compliance with applicable standards, project specifications, and customer requirements Supply creative feedback to increase the quality of extinguishing systems and engineering processes. Are you ready to be part of a team that drives innovation in the automotive industry? At Anadolu Isuzu, every opinion matters, every individual is equal. We care more about what you can do than who you are.  We work together to build a fair and inclusive work culture in an environment where different talents meet so that all our employees can realize their potential in the best way possible. Join the Anadolu Isuzu family as Product Development (Powertrain) Design Engineer , take the lead in innovative projects, and let’s design the future of mobility together! If You Also; Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related engineering discipline Minimum 3 years of experience in the automotive industry (must) Knowledge of powertrain systems (engine, transmission, cooling systems, exhaust systems, retarder, fuel systems etc.) Proficiency in 3D CAD software (preferably CATIA, NX, SolidWorks, or similar) Strong understanding of GD&T, tolerance stack-up, and technical drawing standards Solid knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes (casting, forging, machining, etc.) Familiarity with FEA/CAE analysis tools (preferred) Experience with product development methodologies (APQP, PPAP, DFMEA, etc.) Ability to prepare and review technical documentation in English Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and team-oriented mindset Knowledge of NVH principles Experience in validation and testing processes Previous involvement in global OEM projects What will you do when you join us? ??Design and develop powertrain systems from concept phase to mass production Prepare technical specifications, validation plans, and design documentation Ensure customer technical requirements are properly integrated into designs Support prototype build and validation testing activities Collaborate with suppliers for technical evaluations and design alignment Contribute to cost optimization and continuous improvement initiatives Work cross-functionally with manufacturing, quality, purchasing, and project teams How Does Our Journey Progress? Preliminary Evaluation Process Technical & Competency Based Interview Evaluation Tests Physical Interview Reference Check Offer Process Note: Process steps may vary depending on the nature of the position being interviewed. We Grow with Our Differences, Empowered by Equality!At Anadolu Isuzu, every idea counts and every individual matters. Apply now to take part in this journey! Who Are We? As the Anadolu Isuzu family, we operate in more than 50 countries outside Türkiye, with more than half of our business volume coming from overseas markets and the defense industry. At Anadolu Isuzu, we have been manufacturing commercial vehicles in Türkiye since 1984 and have been expanding our production portfolio through a publicly traded joint venture between Anadolu Group, Isuzu Motors Limited, and Itochu. We focus on the commercial vehicle segment of the automotive industry and as Anadolu Isuzu, we have a strong product range, effective after-sales services, and an extensive dealer and service network. We are in an assertive position in export markets through our manufacture of trucks, light trucks, midibuses, buses and pick-ups. What Do We Offer? Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Elektrik Proje Dizayn Mühendisi İstanbul(Asya) About Job ABOUT AKSA BESS Aksa BESS, Aksa Power Generation's strategic investment in the energy storage sector, was established in partnership with EVE Energy, one of the world's leading battery manufacturers. Aksa Power Generation is one of the top 5 manufacturers of power generation systems in the world which is a subsidiary of Kazancı Holding, an energy conglomerate with $ 6.00 billion in revenues worldwide. Operating in the production, supply, project design, and engineering services of energy storage systems, Aksa BESS aims to play a leading role in Turkey's energy transition. Powered by EVE's globally proven battery technologies, Aksa BESS provides turnkey energy storage solutions that deliver high reliability and efficiency. Aksa BESS is determined to shape Turkey's sustainable energy future with technologies that support the integration of renewable energy sources, increase grid flexibility, and contribute to energy supply reliability. ABOUT THE POSITION AKSA BESS is looking for a BESS Project Design Engineer who has strong experience in that process. GENERAL QUALIFICATIONS With no obstacle to work at the location of Aksa Power Generation Kavacık Office/Istanbul. Having a Bachelor's Degree in Electrical, Electrical - Electronic Engineering and Electronic & Communication Engineering, Having minimum 4 years experiences in energy storage systems or relevant departments, Good understanding and awareness of current BESS, renewables and de-carbonization technologies, Good understanding and awareness of current Battery Energy Storage applications, Proven technical ability in preparation of BoQ, technical specifications, project SLD's and layouts, Capex- Opex models, feasebility on battery energy storage, renewable power plants and electric power distribution, Advanced software-aided system design and grid integration skills (PSCAD, ETAP relevant power system design and simulation softwares) along with AUTOCAD, MS OFFICE softwares, Knowledge in current Turkish and European Grid Codes and relevant regulations, also in IEC-EN standards related to design criterias of power systems, Excellent command of written and spoken English (Chines is plus) Strong analytical approach and team player, Excellent communication skills. No military obligation for male candidates. JOB DESCRIPTION The key duties of the successful candidate are; Making software-supported project design, Developing operation-based design templates, Conducting system integration and network compatibility analyses, Creating project-based energy management scenarios and architecture, Preparing single-line diagrams and site plans, Dimensioning system components, Preparing technical specification templates, Creating operation-based Capex - Opex templates, To follow the design, safety and environmental standards regarding battery energy storage. WE OFFER YOU A chance to work with highly talented engineers and a business team, Opportunities to develop and grow your career, A dynamic work environment, A friendly, diverse, sociable workplace where learning is valued, A firm committed to support diversity in its workforce, ensure an environment where all employees can thrive and encourage applications from people of all ethnic, cultural and social backgrounds, A portfolio of projects that requires international collaborations. Description A leading global vendor in the telecommunications and information and communications technology (ICT) industry provides advanced network infrastructure, cloud services, software platforms, and intelligent digital solutions . Through continuous customer-centric innovation , the company has built strong capabilities in telecom network infrastructure, cloud services, software, and intelligent devices . Its products and solutions have been deployed in more than 100 countries , serving a large portion of the world’s population and many of the world’s leading telecom operators . The company’s vision is to enrich people's lives through communication . By leveraging its experience and expertise in the telecom sector , it helps bridge the digital divide and enables more people to benefit from digital technologies regardless of their geographic location. A global telecommunications vendor’s Türkiye Representative Office in Istanbul is looking for a Datacom Network Pre-Sales Engineer (Junior) who is interested in data communication technologies such as routers, switches, and wireless access points . This role is a great opportunity for candidates who want to build their career in network solution design and technical pre-sales . 2. Responsibilities • Support the presales team in providing technical support for data communication products and solutions , including routing & switching , enterprise campus networks , data center networks , and wireless solutions . • Assist in preparing technical proposals , solution documents , and technical sections of bidding documents in collaboration with the sales team . • Support the design of basic network solutions for customer scenarios such as enterprise campus networks and small to medium-sized data centers . • Help prepare network topology diagrams , product configuration lists , and technical documentation . • Participate in customer meetings , workshops , and product demonstrations together with senior presales engineers . • Assist in Proof of Concept (PoC) testing and lab demonstrations to showcase data communication products . • Learn and follow new trends in data communication technologies such as SDN (Software Defined Networking) , cloud networking , and AI-driven networks . • Provide technical support to the sales team during project discussions and customer engagements . 3. Requirements • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering , Telecommunications , Electronics Engineering , or related fields. • 0–3 years of experience in networking , presales , or technical support roles (new graduates with strong networking knowledge are also welcome). • Basic understanding of data communication technologies such as routing (OSPF, BGP) , switching (VLAN, STP) , and TCP/IP networking . • Familiarity with network devices such as routers , switches , and wireless access points . • Knowledge of data center networking concepts (e.g., Spine-Leaf architecture ) and SDN is a plus. • Certifications such as HCIA , HCIP , CCNA , or CCNP are considered an advantage. • Good communication and presentation skills . • Strong willingness to learn and develop technical expertise in networking technologies . • Ability to work in a team environment and support customer-oriented projects . • Good command of English . Preferred Candidate • Years of Experience No experience preference • Level of Education Bachelor’s(Graduate) • Languages English(Reading : Advanced, Writing : Advanced, Speaking : Advanced) Daha Fazla Göster keyboard_arrow_down Şirket Hakkında Randstad Türkiye Human Resources Consultancy 150 - 199 Çalışan 320970 Takipçi Takip Et Randstad, İK hizmetleri sektöründe dünya lideridir. Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Elektronik Tasarım Mühendisi Ankara About Job A career at ASPILSAN Energy is for those who want to do something extraordinary. ASPILSAN Energy Ankara R&D Center is developing state of art battery systems for Defence, Energy, Automotive and Aviation platforms. By joining our fast-growing team, you will have the opportunity to work within exciting projects with collaborative team environment. Job Description: As an Electronics Design Engineer, you will work for the development of Li-Ion Battery Packs, Battery Management Systems (BMS) and Battery Charging Systems with a focus on safety and reliability objectives for development of functionally safe lithium ion battery systems. Your Role: Specify, design, develop and test the battery management systems (BMS) and/or battery charger hardware for lithium ion battery systems. Develop electronic control units for battery management systems with a start-to-finish ownership of hardware – from requirements to design, development, verification, and prototype manufacturing In charge of schematic and PCB layout design and review Battery junction box electrical & electronics development Design and carry out cell level, board level, module level, pack level and system level prototype verification tests for proof of concept Analyze test data and reports to determine if the design meets functional and performance requirements Troubleshoot and help root cause any issues that occur in the prototype line Preparing bill of material(BOM) Define and then follow streamlined hardware development and verification processes complying with related standards to support the certification & qualification of safety critical systems. Prepare battery electronics & hardware requirements, design, verification and test documents in accordance with the related standards process for the hardware you are responsible for. Drive the resolution of cross-functional issues including those related to architecture (performance, power consumption, thermal behavior), development (schematic design, PCB layout and overall system integration), and production (quality, failure analysis, manufacturing, cost). Simulate and design the hardware you are responsible for and create hardware production documentation. Support at system buildup, commissioning, component and integration tests ·        Close cooperation with the software, systems, safety & reliability and mechanical engineers for battery system development. ·        Assist the certification process for safety critical battery hardware. Submit and lead creative ideas to improve Aspilsan value proposition in energy storage. Qualifications: Degree (BSc, MSc, PhD) in Electronics Engineering or similar 3+ years’ experience developing electronics design, high voltage electronic hardware for Battery Management Systems or power electronic hardware for Charger Systems. Strong fundamentals in electronic circuit design/development with microcontroller-based embedded system ·        Experience in using schematic capture (e.g. Altium Designer) and circuit simulation software Proficient PCB layout experience is strongly preferred Experience with board layout and designing circuits for operation in EMI environments such as automotive, military or similar environments Good knowledge of inter-module communications protocols Experience with all types of lab instruments: oscilloscope, data acquisition systems, etc. Strong analytical skills and structured approach Excellent communication skills Team player, confident in technical discussions, ability to organize and “get things done” Structured way of working, high sense of responsibility, Hands-On attitude Very good English language skills (written and spoken) Bonus Qualifications: Hands-On experience for HV battery management systems and lithium ion battery packs. Professional experience in the development of functional safety hardware (DO-254, ARP4754, MIL-STD-704, MIL-STD-461, MIL-STD-810, DO-160, ISO 26262, IEC 61508) Requirements-based design experience (preferably using DOORs) Strong understanding of battery gauging algorithms and how hardware design decisions influence SOC and SOH accuracy Location: ASPILSAN ANKARA R&D Center Key Words: Battery, BMS, Charger, Hardware, Altium, DO-254, ISO26262, PCB, Avionics, Automotive Preferred Candidate • Years of Experience 3 - 10 years of experience • Level of Education Bachelor’s(Graduate), Master’s(Student), Master’s(Graduate), Doctorate(Student), Doctorate(Graduate) • Languages English(Reading : Advanced, Writing : Advanced, Speaking : Advanced) Daha Fazla Göster keyboard_arrow_down Şirket Hakkında ASPİLSAN ENERJİ SANAYİ VE TİCARET ANONİM ŞİRKETİ Defense Industry, Battery-cell 250 - 349 Çalışan 14306 Takipçi Takip Et Şirketin Diğer İlanları chevron_right Bu Pozisyon İçin Sık Paylaşılan Maaşlar Maaş aralığı kullanıcıların en sık paylaştığı verilere dayanır. Benzer ilanları keşfetmek için iş alarmı kur Teknik Yazar İstanbul(Asya) İş İlanı Hakkında TCI Aircraft Interiors was founded in 2010, and in 2023, it entered a new era with the merger of three subsidiary companies under Turkish Airlines.Combining over a decade of experience with an innovative vision, TCI leverages its enhanced capabilities to provide cutting-edge solutions for both wide and narrow body aircrafts. As the only company in its field operating in Türkiye, we proudly represent our country while setting new standards in the international aviation industry and continue our mission to provide the best values in the sector. We offer in our product range; economy and business class seats, galleys, lavatories, and in-flight entertainment and satellite internet (IFEC) systems for commercial aircrafts. TCI also provides the most innovative solutions to the aviation industry with products such as service trolleys, cargo containers, and seat power systems, which are widely used in aviation operations. The company operates with design, engineering, manufacturing, and R&D capabilities at its facilities in Istanbul and Seattle, serving multiple aircraft types and catering to industry leaders such as Boeing, Airbus, and some of the world’s leading airlines. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Aviation / Mechanical / Electrical-Electronic Engineering, or a related technical field Minimum of 4 years of experience in the Aviation or Automotive industry Experience in preparing Component Maintenance Manuals (CMM) Knowledge of aviation standards and regulations (e.g., ATA 100, TDS0063, iSpec 2200, S1000D) Strong technical writing skills Advanced proficiency in English (written and spoken) Attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills Ability to work effectively in a team environment and strong communication skills Familiarity with CAD software such as CATIA or others Practical experience with aircraft maintenance procedures Experience with technical documentation tools (e.g., Adobe FrameMaker) Experience with Office Programs. Job Description Create and update Component Maintenance Manuals (CMM) for aviation components; Create and update Service bulletin for aviation components; Collaborate with engineering, production, and quality teams to gather necessary technical data; Detail maintenance procedures and repair instructions in accordance with aviation standards; Prepare documents that comply with international aviation regulations and customer requirements; Manage revision processes within the technical documentation lifecycle; Implement changes to documents as needed based on customer feedback.
